title: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 01) vs. Evangelion 1.0
wikitext: ← [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0|'''Back to ''Neon Genesis Evangelion'' vs. ''Evangelion 1.0''''']] ===Tanks!=== [[File:01 C005 big2.jpg|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Tanks.png|320px]] Note the change of color in the water ===Our hero!=== [[File:Shinji Ep 1.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild OurHero.png|320px]] ==="Whatta waste of change..."=== [[Image:01 C018 shinji-phone.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C47 shinji-phone.jpg|320px]] ''We get more of a "lost in the middle of nowhere" sense here.'' ===Birds Alerted by Local Quantum Phenomenon=== [[Image:01 C023 birds.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C01 birds.jpg|320px]] ''Direct retake. Now more minimalistic. As noted, the birds’ movement correspond extensively to the original.'' ===Crashing Heavy Fighter VTOL=== [[Image:01 C041 vtol-crash 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C59 vtol-crash 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:01 C041 vtol-crash 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C59 vtol-crash 2.jpg|320px]] ''Direct frame-for-frame correspondence here, although the level of detail has been bumped way up.'' ===Retro Rocket Angel=== [[Image:01 C042 sachi-jump 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C27 sachi-jump 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:01 C042 sachi-jump 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C27 sachi-jump 2.jpg|320px]] ''Jeepers, they spared no expense on this one; calling it a "trace job" wouldn't really be exaggerating. Though the little "halo" flourish is cute.'' ===Get in the Car!=== [[File:Getinthecar.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild MisatoCar.png|380px]] ===Operating System updated=== [[File:Ep.1 Nerv.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Nerv.png|320px]] ===Sachiyaki, or, "Why settle for one when you can have two?"=== [[Image:01 C128 2nd-face.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C29 2nd-face.jpg|320px]] ''In the original, this shot is stationary, whereas Rebuild actually animates the second face emerging (something depicted in the manga, as well). Definitely a welcome addition. The ichor seems to be obscured by the heat haze / crappy trailer quality.'' ===N2 Bomb Explosion=== [[File:Ep.1 Explosion.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Explosion.png|320px]] ''Are they in the Moon?'' ===Car Talk=== [[File:Ep1 CarTalk.png|260px]] [[File:Rebuild CarTalk.png|280px]] ===Nerv logo=== [[File:Ep1 Door.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Door.png|320px]] ===Nerv Elevator=== [[File:Ep1 Elevator.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Elevator.png|320px]] ===Inside Dogma=== [[File:Ep1 Inside.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild InsideCentral.png|320px]] [[File:Ep1 Inside2.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild InsideCentral2.png|320px]] ===Nerv environment=== [[File:Ep1 Nerv.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild InsideNerv.png|320px]] ===Ritsuko=== [[File:Ep1 Ritsuko.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Ritsuko.png|320px]] [[File:Ep1 Encounter.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Encounter.png|320px]] ===First Encounter=== [[File:Ep1 Eva1.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild FirstEncounter.png|320px]] [[File:Ep1 Rejection.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Rejection.png|320px]] ===Random Guys=== [[File:Ep1 RandomGuys.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild RandomGuys.png|320px]] ===Misato's gaze=== [[File:Ep1 Misato.png|245px]] [[File:Rebuild Misato.png|320px]] ===Injured Rei=== [[Image:01 C257 shinji-rei.jpg|246px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C08 rei-shinji.jpg|320px]] [[Image:01 C258 rei-bed.jpg|246px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C09 rei-bed.jpg|320px]] ''Shinji's expression seems more... effective in Rebuild.'' ===Pain in the Neck=== [[Image:01 C300 eva01-plug.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C02 eva01-plug.jpg|320px]] ''A much more intricate restraint set-up this time around. The wall-like structures that envelop the shoulder pylons are either eliminated for Rebuild, or they have withdrawn by this point. The gizmo in the upper right with the (oldskool) Nerv logo on its seems to be the entry plug insertion mechanism, though it’s hard to see given the angle and all the stuff blocking the view.'' ===Eva-01, Uncaged!!=== [[Image:01 C315 eva01-uncaged 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C58 eva01-uncaged 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:01 C315 eva01-uncaged 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C58 eva01-uncaged 2.jpg|320px]] ===To the Launchpad!!=== [[Image:01 C324 eva01-move.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C04 eva01-move.jpg|320px]] ===Surfacing=== [[Image:01 C343B eva01-up.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C01 eva01-up.jpg|320px]] ''No contest here.'' ← [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0|'''Back to ''Neon Genesis Evangelion'' vs. ''Evangelion 1.0''''']] [[Category:Guides]] [[Category:Rebuild of Evangelion]] [[Category:Comparison Pages]]
html:
← Back to Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0

Contents

  • 1 Tanks!
  • 2 Our hero!
  • 3 "Whatta waste of change..."
  • 4 Birds Alerted by Local Quantum Phenomenon
  • 5 Crashing Heavy Fighter VTOL
  • 6 Retro Rocket Angel
  • 7 Get in the Car!
  • 8 Operating System updated
  • 9 Sachiyaki, or, "Why settle for one when you can have two?"
  • 10 N2 Bomb Explosion
  • 11 Car Talk
  • 12 Nerv logo
  • 13 Nerv Elevator
  • 14 Inside Dogma
  • 15 Nerv environment
  • 16 Ritsuko
  • 17 First Encounter
  • 18 Random Guys
  • 19 Misato's gaze
  • 20 Injured Rei
  • 21 Pain in the Neck
  • 22 Eva-01, Uncaged!!
  • 23 To the Launchpad!!
  • 24 Surfacing

Tanks![edit]

Note the change of color in the water


Our hero![edit]

"Whatta waste of change..."[edit]

We get more of a "lost in the middle of nowhere" sense here.


Birds Alerted by Local Quantum Phenomenon[edit]

Direct retake. Now more minimalistic. As noted, the birds’ movement correspond extensively to the original.


Crashing Heavy Fighter VTOL[edit]

Direct frame-for-frame correspondence here, although the level of detail has been bumped way up.


Retro Rocket Angel[edit]

Jeepers, they spared no expense on this one; calling it a "trace job" wouldn't really be exaggerating. Though the little "halo" flourish is cute.


Get in the Car![edit]


Operating System updated[edit]


Sachiyaki, or, "Why settle for one when you can have two?"[edit]

In the original, this shot is stationary, whereas Rebuild actually animates the second face emerging (something depicted in the manga, as well). Definitely a welcome addition. The ichor seems to be obscured by the heat haze / crappy trailer quality.


N2 Bomb Explosion[edit]

Are they in the Moon?


Car Talk[edit]


Nerv logo[edit]

Nerv Elevator[edit]

Inside Dogma[edit]

Nerv environment[edit]

Ritsuko[edit]

First Encounter[edit]

Random Guys[edit]

Misato's gaze[edit]

Injured Rei[edit]

Shinji's expression seems more... effective in Rebuild.


Pain in the Neck[edit]

A much more intricate restraint set-up this time around. The wall-like structures that envelop the shoulder pylons are either eliminated for Rebuild, or they have withdrawn by this point. The gizmo in the upper right with the (oldskool) Nerv logo on its seems to be the entry plug insertion mechanism, though it’s hard to see given the angle and all the stuff blocking the view.

Eva-01, Uncaged!![edit]


To the Launchpad!![edit]


Surfacing[edit]

No contest here.


← Back to Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0
